usage.h1: font-heading font-bold text-5xl md:text-7xl tracking-tight leading-none

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)] transition-all duration-300

cards.default: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border/50 shadow-xl backdrop-blur-sm

gradients.hero_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-primary via-secondary to-accent

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on the background to reduce digital flatness.

hero_background.description: Abstract digital waves, vibrant and energetic. Use as a hero section background with overlay.

feature_code_execution.description: Green code light in dark room. Use for the 'Code Execution' or 'IDE' feature section.

feature_community.description: Man in neon light looking at phone. Use for 'Community' or 'Mobile' feature.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. UPDATE TAILWIND CONFIG: Extend the theme with the colors and fonts defined above. Ensure `darkMode: 'class'` is set.

3. UPDATE CSS VARIABLES: Replace the contents of `src/index.css` with the CSS variables provided in the `colors.css_vars` section. Note: The provided values are in HSL format (without 'hsl()') to work with Tailwind's opacity modifier syntax.
4. CREATE LAYOUTS: Build the `MarketingLayout` and `DashboardLayout` components using the grid systems defined.
5. APPLY STYLES: Use the `visual_enhancers` classes for glassmorphism and gradients.
6. USE IMAGES: Implement the provided image URLs in their respective sections. Use `next/image` if possible, or standard `img` tags if using plain React.
7. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element (buttons, inputs, links) has a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='login-btn'`).
8. FILE EXTENSIONS: Since the environment uses .js, ensure all new components are created as .js files (e.g., `Button.js`, `Hero.js`).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. Use the specified 'Electric Obsidian' theme.
Do not use gradients for dark colors; use them for text or accents only.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states and transitions.
Prioritize Shadcn UI components but customize them to match the 'Electric Obsidian' theme.
Do not use 'Inter' font. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for body.
